rule_metadata.name: LoGiC_NET
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'LoGiC.NET' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule LoGiC_NET
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'LoGiC.NET' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "LoGiC.NET"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /AnErrupTion\/LoGiC\.NET/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /LoGiC\.NET\.exe/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
